name: Wild Goose
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the plucked and cleaned goose overnight in well salted water.
2. Rinse and dry the goose, then stuff it with 2 quartered onions and 2 quartered apples.
3. Place the breast side up in an open roaster pan and cover with 2 strips of thick bacon.
4. Brown the goose in a 475°F (245°C) oven until the bacon is crisp.
5. Remove all fat from the pan and discard it. Then remove the bacon.
6. Add 1 quartered onion, 1 carrot, 1 celery stalk, 1 bay leaf, 3 sprigs of parsley, 1/2 teaspoon thyme, 2 cans consomme mixed with 2 cans water, and 1 cup dry red wine to the pan.
7. Cover the pan and roast at 375°F (190°C) for 2 to 2-1/2 hours, basting often.
8. The goose should be done so that the meat readily pulls off the carcass.
9. Remove the goose from the roaster and place it on a warm platter.
10. Remove and discard the stuffing.
11. Strain the gravy and thicken with 1 tablespoon cornstarch mixed with 2 tablespoons cold water.
12. Correct seasoning if necessary.
13. Serve with wild rice.
